# Chapter 7: Differential equations: ODEs  (~120 pp)
- 7.1 What an ODE is, where it comes from (10)
- 7.2 First-order linear ODEs (15)
- 7.3 Separable equations (10)
- 7.4 Second-order linear with constant coefficients (15)
- 7.5 Forced response: resonance, beating (15)
- 7.6 Systems of ODEs (15)
- 7.7 Phase-plane analysis (12)
- 7.8 Numerical ODE solvers: Euler, RK4, stiffness (15)
- 7.9 Failure section: numerical instability and the stiffness trap (8)
- 7.10 Worked examples: RC circuit, pendulum, predator-prey, drug kinetics (5)

**Archetype**: stability, control, transport. **Project**: simulate a pendulum at large angles; compare numerical and small-angle answers. **Exercises**: 45.
